hero.title: Take back control of your money
hero.subtitle: Smart Expense Control helps you track every purchase, scan receipts with AI, and get honest insights — so you stop bleeding cash left and right.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: By using Smart Expense Control you agree to use the service responsibly. AI-generated insights are for informational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice.

privacy.content: We process your account and transaction data to provide expense tracking and AI features. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time from Settings.
